_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: Student Software Developer
experiences.description:
Built a Python/AWS equipment management platform serving 200+ users, integrating AWS SNS event-driven notifications for real-time booking alerts reducing equipment delays by 30% and enabling proactive scheduling across departments.
Designed automated late-return tracking with analytics dashboards, cutting overdue returns by 20% and giving administrators real-time visibility into equipment usage patterns.
Applied clean architecture principles and automated workflows that improved day-to-day platform operational efficiency by 30%, reducing manual overhead for department staff.
responsibilities: Built a Python/AWS equipment management platform serving 200+ users, integrating AWS SNS event-driven notifications for real-time booking alerts reducing equipment delays by 30% and enabling proactive scheduling across departments

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
experiences.description:
Client: Nokia R&D — Verizon, Vodafone UK, Vodafone Italy
Redesigned a Kafka event processing pipeline handling 2.5M+ records/billing cycle at 10K+ req/min; introduced idempotent consumer groups and dead-letter-queue (DLQ) retry logic, reducing service failures by 20% and eliminating all duplicate processing incidents in production.
Optimized latency-critical REST API call flows for Verizon production serving millions of users, cut P99 latency from 100ms to 20ms via session-state preloading and connection-pool tuning; Bengaluru layered Redis write-through caching, reducing DB round-trips by 65% and query times by 40%.
Resolved a P0 production outage affecting 100K+ concurrent Vodafone users by implementing distributed locking and idempotency controls, eliminating 90% of session-collision errors within a single release cycle.
Migrated 6 legacy Diameter protocol components to gRPC-based microservices (reducing inter-service latency 25–30%), delivered Spring Batch reconciliation pipelines achieving 89.95% data accuracy, and architected geo-distributed deployments that doubled peak traffic capacity.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.description:
Client: Aflac — Insurance Benefits Enrollment Platform
Engineered Java/Spring Boot REST APIs and microservices for Aflac’s enterprise benefits enrollment platform, enabling secure agent and admin management of enrollments across the US using Hibernate/JPA, PostgreSQL, and Maven.
Elevated JUnit 5 test coverage to 85%+ across all services, resolved every high/critical SonarQube issue pre-release, and mentored new engineers on Java best practices, Git workflows, and CI/CD with Jenkins.
Served as on-call engineer for production deployments, monitoring Dynatrace dashboards and AWS CloudWatch in real time to detect and resolve incidents before user impact, maintaining 99.9% uptime SLA.

experiences.title: Student Software Engineer
experiences.description:
Built a Java/Spring Boot REST API platform with MySQL to deliver real-time market pricing and government scheme information to farmers, integrating third-party APIs for live data feeds.
Implemented Spring Security role-based access control for multiple user types, increasing platform adoption and farmer participation by ~25%.
